parsed.production_notes: The video features real actors with natural expressions, movements, and lighting, indicating it was human-recorded without any discernible AI generation.

characters.appearance: A young woman in her mid-20s with a slender build and medium complexion. She has dark hair pulled back into a low ponytail or bun, with some strands framing her face. Her facial features are expressive and animated.
characters.wardrobe: A dark green oversized t-shirt with a colorful 'CAREFREE' graphic on the front, paired with light blue high-waisted baggy jeans. She wears a small, dark bracelet on her right wrist.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, confident, and engaging, using hand gestures to emphasize her points.

characters.appearance: A young man in his mid-20s with a slim build and medium complexion. He has short, dark hair styled with a fringe and wears round, yellow-tinted glasses. His facial features are attentive.
characters.wardrobe: A light beige long-sleeved t-shirt with a small button placket at the collar.
characters.demeanor: Curious and attentive, leaning forward and clasping his hands as he listens.

characters.appearance: A young man in his mid-20s with a slim build and medium complexion. He has short, dark hair and wears rectangular black-rimmed glasses. His expression is thoughtful.
characters.wardrobe: An off-white short-sleeved t-shirt with a large, prominent green '16' graphic on the front.
characters.demeanor: Initially skeptical, then intrigued and questioning.

scenes.setting: An outdoor park or garden area with lush green trees and foliage, a curved stone bench, and a paved pathway. It is daytime with bright, natural lighting.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, slightly over the shoulder of Character B, focusing on Character A.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a young woman with dark hair pulled back, stands facing two young men seated on a curved stone bench in a lush green park. She wears a dark green t-shirt and light blue baggy jeans. She holds a light-colored smartphone in her left hand, gesturing with her right hand as she speaks with an animated expression. The two young men, Character B in a beige shirt and yellow glasses, and Character C in a white shirt with a green '16' and black glasses, are seated on the bench, looking up at her attentively. The background is filled with dense green foliage and trees, with a paved pathway curving behind the bench.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot of Character A standing in a park, holding a smartphone and gesturing, as she speaks to two young men seated on a bench. The men are partially visible on the left, listening intently. The background is a vibrant green park. Kannada and English subtitles are displayed at the bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ನೀವ್ ಹೇಳ್ತಿದ್ರಿ ಅಲ್ವಾ, ಮನೇಲ್ ಕೂತು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋಕೆ ಆಗಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ, ಬಟ್ ಇಟ್ಸ್ ಬೀನ್ ಓನ್ಲಿ 15 ಡೇಸ್ ಅಂಡ್ ಬಿಕಾಸ್ ಆಫ್ ದಿಸ್ AI ಟೀಚರ್, ಮೈ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹ್ಯಾಸ್ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ಡ್ ಸೋ ಮಚ್. [You were saying, right, that you can't learn English sitting at home, but it's been only 15 days and because of this AI teacher, my English has improved so much.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Neeventhu adraana, Manelkondu English kaniyakadala antha, it's been only 15 days and because of this AI teacher, my English has improved so much.

scenes.setting: An outdoor park or garden area with lush green trees and foliage, a curved stone bench, and distant residential buildings. It is daytime with bright, natural lighting.
scenes.camera: Medium close-up on Character B and C, with Character A partially visible on the right edge of the frame.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two young men are seated on a curved stone bench in a park, looking up and to the right with expressions of surprise and curiosity. Character C, on the left, wears a white t-shirt with a green '16' and black glasses. Character B, on the right, wears a beige t-shirt and yellow glasses, with his hands clasped in front of him, leaning forward slightly. Character A is partially visible on the far right, out of focus. The background shows lush green trees and some distant residential buildings, indicating an urban park setting.

scenes.visual_description: A medium close-up shot of the two young men (Character B and C) seated on a bench, looking surprised and asking questions. Character A is partially visible on the right. The background is a green park with distant buildings. Kannada and English subtitles are displayed at the bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ವೇಟ್, ಒಂದು AI ಟೀಚರ್ ನಿಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಕಲ್ಸಿತಿಯಾ? [Wait, an AI teacher taught you to speak English?]
Character C says: ಅಂಡ್ ಓನ್ಲಿ 15 ಡೇಸ್? [And only 15 days?]
Character B says: ಇದ್ಯಾದೋ ಹೊಸ ಆಪ್... [What new app is this...]
scenes.on_screen_text: Wait, ondu AI teacher nimage English maatadod kalisithiya? And only 15 days? Idyaade hosa app...

scenes.setting: An outdoor park or garden area with lush green trees and foliage, and distant residential buildings. It is daytime with bright, natural lighting.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, similar to Scene 1, but slightly wider, showing more of the background buildings.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a young woman with dark hair pulled back, stands in a park, facing two young men who are partially visible on the left and right edges of the frame. She wears a dark green t-shirt and light blue baggy jeans. She holds a light-colored smartphone in her left hand, gesturing with her right hand, palms open, with a confident smile. The background features dense green trees and foliage, with tall residential buildings visible in the distance under a bright sky.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot of Character A standing in the park, holding her phone and gesturing, confirming the existence of the app to the two men who are partially visible on the sides. The background shows trees and buildings. Kannada and English subtitles are displayed at the bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಹೌದು, ಒಂದು ಆಪ್ ಇದೆ. [Yes, there is an app.]
Character A says: ಸ್ಪೀಕ್ [Speak]
